content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: Opinion Request Meeting Participants

Date: 2-17-78

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION

Subject: Discussion Item.

An organization makes an independent expenditure of $250 and a contribution of $250.

Is the organization a "committee?" (i.e., do (b) disbursements cumulate with (c) disbursements to become a "(b) committee?")

An organization makes an independent expenditure of $250 and contributions of $4800.

Is the organization a "committee?" (i.e., do (b) disbursements cumulate with (c) disbursements to become a "(c) committee?")

NEW: jo

neither would be committees —
